name: Faraday Technology Corporation
summary: Faraday Technology Corporation operates as a fabless ASIC/SoC and silicon intellectual property (IP) provider worldwide. The company offers SoC design services and evaluation platforms; and ASIC services. It also provides IP products, including library and memory compilers, processor cores, analog IPs, peripheral IPs, and interface IPs. The company offers design solutions for a range of applications comprising consumer electronics, multimedia, display, communication, networking, and PC peripheral/storage. Faraday Technology Corporation was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
